summary: PART I References in this Annual Report on Form 10-K to we, our, us, Lennox, LII or the Company refer to Lennox International Inc. and its subsidiaries, unless the context requires otherwise. The Company We are a global leader in energy-efficient climate-control solutions. We design, manufacture and market a broad range of products for the heating, ventilation, air conditioning and refrigeration (HVACR) markets.
